Class Asset

java.lang.Object
Main.Asset
public class Asset extends Object
Utility class responsible for loading and managing image resources used in the UI. Images are cached to prevent loading the same file multiple times from disk, improving performance and reducing resource usage.

  • Constructor Summary

    • Asset

      public Asset()

  • Method Details

    • getImage

      public static javafx.scene.image.Image getImage(String name)
      Loads an image from the /Image/ directory. If the image has already been loaded before, it will be returned from the cache instead of loading the file again.
      Parameters:
      name - the image file name (without extension)
      Returns:
      the loaded Image instance

    • createImageView

      public static javafx.scene.image.ImageView createImageView(String key, double H, double W)
      Creates an ImageView using the specified image key and sets its width and height. If either width or height is set to 0, the aspect ratio is preserved automatically.
      Parameters:
      key - the image key used to load the image
      H - the desired height of the ImageView
      W - the desired width of the ImageView
      Returns:
      a configured ImageView displaying the requested image

    • createBackgroundView

      public static javafx.scene.image.ImageView createBackgroundView(String key, double H, double W)
      Creates an ImageView for background images located in the /Image/Background/ directory. The image is resized based on the specified width and height, preserving aspect ratio when either dimension is set to 0.
      Parameters:
      key - the background image key
      H - the desired height of the background
      W - the desired width of the background
      Returns:
      a configured ImageView for the background image

    • getBackGroundImage

      public static javafx.scene.image.Image getBackGroundImage(String name)
      Loads background images from the /Image/Background/ directory. The loaded image is stored in the cache to avoid loading the same resource multiple times.
      Parameters:
      name - the background image file name (without extension)
      Returns:
      the loaded background Image

    • createGridButton

      public static CharacterButton createGridButton(Cookie _char, double H, double W)
      Creates a CharacterButton used in the character selection grid. The button is constructed using character information such as name, description, best score, and sprite image.
      Parameters:
      _char - the character data used to create the button
      H - the height of the character icon
      W - the width of the character icon
      Returns:
      a CharacterButton configured for the character selection grid
